strengths: 15+ years full-stack experience spanning TypeScript/Node.js, React, and multiple backends
Current role at re:cinq involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, matching the AI agent requirement
Strong testing/craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, founded test runner library, taught TDD courses)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in the resume
Limited explicit cloud/Kubernetes depth beyond AWS CDK at Optilyz and a GISCollective k8s mention
MIT degree dates (2009-2012) overlap heavily with concurrent full-time roles, raising a credibility flag worth verifying
response.justification: Candidate exceeds the 6+ years bar with ~15 years of full-stack work and directly matches the core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) at Optilyz and re:cinq, plus the AI-agent requirement via current MCP/agentic tooling work at re:cinq. Testing expertise is well-evidenced (TDD at RIDE, authored Fluent-Asserts and Trial test runner). Databases (MongoDB at Optilyz, MySQL/SQL in skills) and Docker/Kubernetes (GISCollective deployment) are covered, and Java appears at Altom and National Instruments-adjacent C/C++. Gaps: no Nest.js mention and Kotlin is absent, though the polyglot pattern suggests fast ramp-up. The overlapping MIT degree with full-time roles is a minor credibility concern but doesn't outweigh demonstrated delivery.
